name: agience-server-sage
description: Hybrid semantic + keyword search, evidence-backed synthesis, and optional projection into Azure AI Search.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Hybrid semantic + keyword search across workspaces and collections

tools.name: get_artifact
tools.description: Fetch an artifact by ID with full context

tools.name: search_azure
tools.description: Search via an Azure AI Search index (BYOK connector)

tools.name: index_to_azure
tools.description: Project workspace artifacts into an Azure AI Search index

tools.name: research
tools.description: Multi-step retrieval + LLM synthesis constrained by evidence

tools.name: cite_sources
tools.description: Produce provenance receipts for a synthesised answer

tools.name: ask
tools.description: Ask a question with optional artifact context — search + synthesise

tools.name: extract_information
tools.description: Extract structured fields from an artifact's content using a schema

tools.name: generate_meeting_insights
tools.description: Derive meeting summary, action items, and coaching from a transcript artifact

resources.description: Browse committed artifacts in a collection

AGIENCE_API_URI.description: Base URI of the agience-core backend

MCP_PORT.description: HTTP port for the MCP server
